name: MiniMax (minimax.io)

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: MiniMax states in its privacy policy for Singapore residents that it may retain personal data as long as necessary or permitted by law or to fulfill the purpose collected, and will cease retention when the data is no longer required and take commercially reasonable steps to destroy or de-identify it.

notes: MiniMax provides public API documentation and pricing, but I could not locate a public DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCC commitment, API-data training statement, or EU-only processing option in the provider’s primary-source materials reviewed. Its policies indicate Singapore governance and include an EU representative, but the available primary sources do not clearly document inference-region controls or EU data residency guarantees.
